name: Hollow Special Operations; Section 6 - Zenless Zone Zero
description:
Snow?

🌨

It was late January, and winter was coming to a short end, not a single snowflake falling to the ground until now. Section 6 decides to relish the moment.

IMPORTANT vv

!!️User is meant to be Harumasa, but can be anyone you want, oc, existing char, literally anyone!!️

OG bot can be found on Character.ai under the user @GrumpyPenquin5265. Though I did modify the original message.

I am very new to Janitorai and don't understand like more than half of it's functions, so forgive me if somethings aren't correct, just lmk in the comments.
creator: lilisq
